user_query:
I chaired our Early Modern Women’s Lives research collective meeting and need clean, shareable outputs prepared from the materials in input/. Please do the following using ONLY the provided files:

Inputs:
- input/agenda.md
- input/notes_raw.txt
- input/draft_minutes.md

Deliverables and output paths:
1) Rewrite the existing draft minutes into a corrected, complete minutes document that reflects what actually happened on 2024-10-18. Save as output/meeting_minutes_2024-10-18.md.
2) Compose a concise executive summary of the meeting with key decisions, action items (assignee, task, due date), and the next meeting details. Save as output/executive_summary_2024-10-18.txt.
3) Draft an email to the collective circulating the minutes and action items. The email should include a subject line, a brief overview of the meeting purpose and 17th-century focus areas addressed, the top decisions, the full action list with assignees and due dates, the next meeting, and a polite request for corrections. Save the message text as output/email_to_collective_2024-10-18.txt.

Requirements and checks:
- Treat input/draft_minutes.md as a starting point that must be corrected and completed by reconciling it with input/notes_raw.txt and structuring it according to input/agenda.md. Correct the meeting date, attendees, and any mismatched or missing details.
- Minutes must include: date, time, attendees (separating apologies), and a section for each numbered agenda item from agenda.md. For any agenda item not substantively discussed in notes_raw.txt, mark it as “Deferred” in the minutes.
- Capture every DECISION and ACTION line from notes_raw.txt in the minutes. Ensure all action items appear in both the minutes and the executive summary with the same assignee, task, and due date.
- Use the attendees and apologies exactly as evidenced in notes_raw.txt (correct any mistakes in the draft).
- Include a small “Open questions”/“Unresolved” section listing any items marked with “??” in notes_raw.txt.
- The executive summary must have three sections in this order: Key decisions; Action items (one per line in the form: Assignee — Task — Due date YYYY-MM-DD); Next meeting (date and time).
- The email must reference that the attached/linked files are output/meeting_minutes_2024-10-18.md and output/executive_summary_2024-10-18.txt, and its action item list must exactly match the summary.

Please do not add new content not supported by the inputs. Preserve the 17th-century context and terminology as used in the notes. Keep everything clear and professional, suitable to send to our research group. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
